title: Forvum plugin manifest
description: Static manifest a Forvum plugin ships at META-INF/forvum/plugin.json. It is scanned at build time (ULTRAPLAN section 6.3) to record the contributed providers and emit native-image reflection hints before any plugin code runs; ServiceLoader is a fast-jar-only fallback. This file documents the v0.1 contract — the parser lives in the forvum-engine BuildStep (a later milestone), not in the SDK.

id.description: Stable plugin id, matching the extensionId() returned by each contributed provider.

version.description: Plugin version (informational; Forvum's own versions are governed by forvum-bom).

provides.description: Which provider SPIs this plugin contributes (ChannelProvider / ModelProvider / ToolProvider / MemoryProvider).
